privileged_info_summary: The duplicate_qcp_for_product task operates on Odoo 17 Quality Control Points (QCPs) using synthetic data. The source QCP is named 'Surface Quality Check - Cabinet with Doors' and is linked to the 'Cabinet with Doors' product. The task duplicates this QCP and modifies the copy to create a new QCP named 'Surface Quality Check - Large Cabinet' linked to the 'Large Cabinet' product. All product and QCP names are synthetic data created by the task setup scripts (setup_data.py and setup_task.sh), not from external sources. The verifier checks that: (1) the new QCP exists with correct name, (2) it is linked to 'Large Cabinet', (3) the original QCP remains unchanged and linked to 'Cabinet with Doors', (4) QCP count increases by exactly 1, (5) test_type is preserved, and (6) creation timestamp is present.
